name: VectorRazor
author: TheKnook
description: Advanced vector-cutting system with precise laser deployment. Deploy smart charges that extend an extremely powerful and precise laser cutter to cut circles, squares, triangles, and even door-shaped openings in any material. Perfect for tactical breaching operations or gigs that require the utmost precision. Now features adjustable activation delay (0-5s) and an optional remote detonation mode so you can plant multiple charges and arm them simultaneously.
